match.userMessage:
Camera starts locked wide eye-level on Scarlett walking steadily along the Bondi promenade path with natural stride. Blonde strands flutter lightly in the breeze as she moves forward. Quick handheld cut follows as she turns her head abruptly to glance back over her shoulder with effortless cool. Surfers cresting on waves behind her. Golden morning light shifts across the figure during the turn.

Scarlett delivers the line in voiceover with relaxed, breezy delivery, head turn syncing to the casual glance.

Ocean breeze stirs loose fabric and hair. Waves roll steadily in the background.

[SCARLETT, light breezy]: "Made for the water."

Ambient sounds: ocean waves rolling, light coastal breeze. footsteps on paved path, wind rustling fabric and hair.
